existing_metrics_file.note: These are from early check-warning/check-block phase. Perplexity and Notion were the slowest (70s, 270s).

status_distribution.note: UNKNOWN status means older results that didn't include explicit status field — most are implicit successes

recurring_patterns.note: Deepseek consistently returns 400 when APF interferes — SSE format/charset issues required multiple iterations
CORS + H2 protocol errors. Required qianwen.com domain addition and template fixes
DuckDuckGo uses Vercel AI SDK with non-standard SSE. Many iterations needed (400-428) to get format right
Kimi blocks silently without error response
Notion API may have changed or session expired

duckduckgo_iteration_storm.note: DuckDuckGo SSE format debugging consumed ~58% of all requests. Vercel AI SDK uses non-standard format requiring many back-and-forth iterations.

deepseek_charset_iterations.note: Deepseek SSE required no-content-length, no-charset, event-prefix, goaway, no-endstream fixes across ~10 iterations

perplexity_slug_problem.note: Perplexity warning display blocked by thread_url_slug requirement. Empty string doesn't work, fake UUID causes 403. Unresolved.

websocket_services_unblockable.note: These services deliver chat via WebSocket, completely bypassing HTTP-based APF. Requires different approach.

test_pc_environment.git_sync: GitHub via dev_test_sync repo, git pull/push via .cmd batch files
resource_constraints_observed: Chrome using ~6GB RAM across 48 processes — many tabs accumulated from testing
DPI scaling (125%) requires logical coordinates for all interactions
Snapshot label invalidation after waits — must re-snapshot before each interaction
Desktop Commander write_file 25-30 line chunk limit
Git Korean path handling requires chcp 65001 + %USERPROFILE% expansion
